case_title: CHARLIE M DUQUE LEIVA VS. AYUSH AGARWAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEIVA, CHARLIE M DUQUE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT AGARWAL, AYUSH  AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
